$comment: Review pattern for case study testimonials. Every cleared testimonial ships as a Review entity attached to the ProfessionalService (the Pre-Sold Author Package). The Homepage Section 7 testimonial rhythm and every case study page's pull quotes hydrate from this shape. Do not ship placeholder testimonials in the JSON-LD, in line with the copy rule; only ship entries once the quote is cleared with the reviewer.
name: {{REVIEW_HEADLINE}}

$example_populated_ai_or_die.name: The stack works because they built it while writing the book
$example_populated_ai_or_die.reviewBody: Brett and Mike ran the Pre-Sold Author Package on themselves before selling it. That is what makes this a real product. The book, the podcast, the knowledge panel, and the pre-sold list all landed on the same day. That is not a marketing artifact; that is a build discipline. We took Legacy in as the publisher because the manuscript was a Legacy manuscript from the first draft, and the launch mechanics were built to feed our list at the same time.
